code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut longest = ""
  mut longest_len = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    mut is_space = false
    if at_end
      is_space = true
    else
      let bopt = string.byte_at(line, i)
      match bopt
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          is_space = true
        else
          current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        is_space = true
      end
    end
    if is_space
      let clen = string.len(current)
      if clen > longest_len
        longest_len = clen
        longest = current
      end
      current = ""
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("longest=#{longest}")
end
